extension/**/*.{ts,tsx}: bash -c 'cd extension && pnpm exec eslint --fix $(printf "%s\n" "$@" | sed "s:^extension/::")' --
site/**/*.{ts,tsx}: bash -c 'cd site && pnpm exec eslint --fix $(printf "%s\n" "$@" | sed "s:^site/::")' --
data/**/*.{ts,js}: bash -c 'cd data && pnpm exec eslint --fix $(printf "%s\n" "$@" | sed "s:^data/::")' --
graphql-client/**/*.{ts,js}: bash -c 'cd graphql-client && pnpm exec eslint --fix $(printf "%s\n" "$@" | sed "s:^graphql-client/::")' --
functions/**/*.{ts,js}: bash -c 'cd functions && pnpm exec eslint --fix $(printf "%s\n" "$@" | sed "s:^functions/::")' --
*.{json,yml,yaml,md}: echo 'Non-code files validated. Type checking happens separately.'
